summary: Backend GET /api/settings returns 200 with homepage_content field. Frontend build FAILS: App.js is missing the opening <SettingsProvider> tag while the closing </SettingsProvider> exists at line 64, causing a compile-time JSX SyntaxError ('Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <CatalogProvider>'). This blocks the entire app — /admin and / both render only the CRA red overlay 'Compiled with problems'. Unable to test any editor / homepage flow until this compile error is fixed.
passed: GET /api/settings → 200 and includes homepage_content field (empty object initially)

failed.issue: App.js has closing </SettingsProvider> on line 64 but no matching opening <SettingsProvider> — parser reports 'Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <CatalogProvider>' at 64:8. Whole app fails to compile.
failed.evidence: Screenshot: CRA overlay 'Compiled with problems: ERROR in ./src/App.js — SyntaxError: /app/frontend/src/App.js: Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <CatalogProvider>. (64:8)'. Confirmed by viewing App.js lines 34-65: only <CatalogProvider><BrowserRouter>...</BrowserRouter></SettingsProvider></CatalogProvider> — SettingsProvider is never opened.

failed.issue: [data-testid=admin-tab-homepage] not present because the app itself does not render (compile error blocks it).

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/App.js: add <SettingsProvider> opening tag just inside <CatalogProvider> (so the tree is <CatalogProvider><SettingsProvider><BrowserRouter>...</BrowserRouter></SettingsProvider></CatalogProvider>), per the PRD ('SettingsProvider wraps BrowserRouter inside CatalogProvider').

After fix, re-run this iteration to verify: admin tab renders, 7 sections present, atelier edit → save → live update, hero eyebrow round-trip, reasons add/remove, atelier image list add/remove, reset-section restores defaults, regression checks.
